steps.title: Backsolving — testing choice B (43)
steps.content:
Backsolving — testing choice B (43):
Plug $t = 5$ into the given equation:
$$s = 40 + 3t$$
$$s = 40 + 3(5) = 40 + 15 = 55$$
The tested value 43 does not equal 55, so choice B is incorrect.

steps.title: Backsolving — testing choice C (45)
steps.content:

$$s = 40 + 3t$$
$$s = 40 + 3(5) = 40 + 15 = 55$$
The tested value 45 does not equal 55, so choice C is incorrect.

steps.title: Backsolving — testing choice D (55)
steps.content:
Backsolving — testing choice D (55):
Plug $t = 5$ into the given equation:
$$s = 40 + 3t$$
$$s = 40 + 3(5) = 40 + 15 = 55$$
The tested value 55 equals the computed speed.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
